title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
